since_last: 28% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.79%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 28% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.20% · BTC -0.13% · Gold -0.44% · Nasdaq100 -1.25%. 28% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.79%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.79%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.87%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +27.47%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +27.47%, BABA +5.68%, AAPL +4.18%, GOOGL +3.56%, AMZN +3.42%. Laggards: DELL -14.09%, MU -10.60%, AMBA -9.62%, MRVL -9.31%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.26% at $133.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.26% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
